windows.command: if (Test-Path '.\venv\Scripts\python.exe') { .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt } else { python -m pip install -r requirements.txt }

osx.command: if [ -f ./venv/bin/python ]; then ./venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; else python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt; fi

linux.command: if [ -f ./venv/bin/python ]; then ./venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt; else python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt; fi

tasks.label: pip install (functions)
tasks.command: if (Test-Path '.\venv\Scripts\python.exe') { .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt } else { python -m pip install -r requirements.txt }

tasks.label: pip install (functions)
tasks.command: if (Test-Path '.\venv\Scripts\python.exe') { .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt } else { python -m pip install -r requirements.txt }
